description_for_human: Access and search documents stored in Box for due diligence and document review workflows.
description_for_model: Use this plugin to search, retrieve, and read documents stored in Box. Ideal for due diligence workflows where you need to find and analyze documents in virtual data rooms, including contracts, financial statements, legal documents, and other deal materials.

functions.name: search_documents
functions.description: Search for documents in Box by keyword, metadata, or content.

query.description: Search query string to find documents

folder_id.description: Restrict search to a specific Box folder ID

file_type.description: Filter by file type: pdf, docx, xlsx, pptx, or all

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 20)

functions.name: get_document
functions.description: Retrieve a specific document from Box by its file ID.

file_id.description: Box file ID of the document to retrieve

version.description: Specific version number to retrieve (default: latest)

functions.name: list_folder
functions.description: List the contents of a Box folder including subfolders and files.

folder_id.description: Box folder ID to list contents of

sort_by.description: Sort order: name, date_modified, or size

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return (default: 50)

functions.name: get_document_text
functions.description: Extract text content from a document in Box for analysis.

file_id.description: Box file ID of the document

page_range.description: Page range to extract text from (e.g., 1-5, 10-15)

functions.name: get_document_metadata
functions.description: Retrieve metadata and properties of a document in Box.

file_id.description: Box file ID of the document

include_classifications.description: Whether to include document classification labels (default: true)
